boundary: audio-only input + fixed task-definition text (label set / MCQ options / tool registry / JSON schema); no golden transcript/answer/intent ever placed in the prompt -- see templates.py module docstring's Information-Boundary-Guard note.

per_item.instr:
Listen to the audio and classify the speaker's emotion. Choose exactly ONE option below.
Options:
0. Amazed
1. Annoyed
2. Anxious
3. Apprehensive
4. Confused
5. Content
6. Disappointed
7. Distrustful
8. Eager
9. Excited
10. Exhausted
11. Frustrated
12. Grateful
13. Happy
14. Helpless
15. Hopeful
16. Hopeless
17. Impatient
18. Inadequate
19. Indifferent
20. Irritated
21. Joyful
22. Nostalgic
23. Optimistic
24. Overwhelmed
25. Proud
26. Regretful
27. Relieved
28. Resigned
29. Resilient
30. Shocked
31. Stressed
32. Surprised
33. Tired
34. Uncertain
35. Unmotivated
36. angry
37. fearful
38. happy
39. sad
40. surprised
Answer with only the option number and label, e.g. '4. ...'.
